# CATL (宁德时代)

CATL is the world's largest power battery manufacturer, dominant in [[battery-technology]]. LFP and ternary lithium batteries are used in EVs and [[energy-storage]]. Deep partnership with [[tesla-energy]]. Developing solid-state batteries ([[lithium-vs-solid-state]]).
